proof_boundary: This artifact proves strict forward propagation of the contiguous order-three reciprocal-defect margin and hence D_(3,n)(0)<0 for every shift. It does not prove noncontiguous order-three minors, any compound order four or higher, the all-order signed-Hankel/Jensen bridge, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The reciprocal-defect coordinate obeys an exact one-sided heat ODE.
Use the contiguous order-three compound margin and its next shift.
Differentiation and exact division give a one-sided cooperative compound system.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact local flow algebra; infinite continuation is separate.

rows.claim: At a zero compound margin, the vector field points inward whenever the next margin is nonnegative.
rows.proof_boundary: Boundary theorem inside the strict ratio cone.

rows.claim: The existing cubic theorem supplies a compact-interval reciprocal-increment tail and the full cubic cone.

diagnostics.cubic_status: exact all-shift cubic forward-propagation theorem with open higher-degree handoff
diagnostics.entry_status: all-shift contiguous order-three entry theorem at lambda=-100 with open forward propagation
diagnostics.ratio_status: exact infinite ratio-cone propagation theorem and open all-order handoff

rows.claim: The compact-interval tail makes alpha_k=O_L(k) and alpha_k+beta_k=O_L(1).
rows.proof_boundary: Coefficient-growth lemma along the actual compact heat trajectory.

rows.claim: Dividing C_n by n+1 gives a locally attained negative minimum and a bounded diagonal coefficient on every compact heat interval.

diagnostics.tail_attainment: g_k=O_L(k^(-1/2)) and q_k=O_L(sqrt(k)) imply C_n=O_L(1), hence z_n->0 uniformly.

rows.proof_boundary: Uses uniform C_n=O_L(1) and the established coefficient-growth bounds.

rows.claim: Strict all-shift entry and the weighted maximum principle propagate every contiguous order-three margin to every finite forward heat time.
rows.formula: C_n(lambda)>0 for every n>=0 and finite lambda>=-100

rows.claim: Every shifted contiguous 3x3 signed-Hankel minor has the required negative sign at lambda=0.
rows.proof_boundary: One contiguous compound order at lambda=0.

rows.claim: Noncontiguous order-three minors and every compound order four or higher still require new coordinates and invariance theorems.
rows.formula: contiguous order 3 closed; noncontiguous order 3 and k>=4 open
rows.proof_boundary: Open all-order signed-Hankel/Jensen bridge; not PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.
